architectural_notes.foundation: Concrete block 1,900,000 kg, center of gravity below ground
architectural_notes.construction_method: Slipform construction, shaft completed in 23 days at 15-20 cm/hour

minecraft_build_notes.key_proportions: Shaft is 9m diameter, 96m to crow's nest. Crow's nest disc is 29m diameter (asymmetric). Space tower tube is 2.5m on top adding 85m more.
minecraft_build_notes.suggested_scale: At 1:1 scale the shaft would be 9 blocks wide and 96 blocks to the crow's nest, 185 blocks total. Consider 1:2 scale for a manageable 93-block build.
main_sections: 2. Cylindrical concrete shaft (9m diameter, ~96m tall) - use light gray concrete
3. Crow's nest disc (29m diameter, asymmetric, at 96m) - wider on one side, contains restaurant
4. Space Tower tube (2.5m diameter metal tube, ~85m, sits on top of crow's nest disc)
5. Euroscoop rotating cabin (glass ring around Space Tower tube, near top)

material_suggestions.crows_nest_disc: Gray concrete, iron blocks for structural ring
material_suggestions.euroscoop_cabin: Light blue stained glass, white concrete trim
material_suggestions.base_landscaping: Park setting with trees (Het Park surroundings)
